features: Colgate Advanced Charcoal Whitening Toothpaste uses activated charcoal to remove surface stains gently while detoxifying the mouth for a visibly whiter smile without damaging enamel or irritating gums
This triple pack of 75ml tubes offers excellent value and provides long lasting oral hygiene benefits including stain removal cavity protection and breath freshening in one easy to use product
Enriched with fluoride for enamel protection and cavity defence the low abrasion formula is suitable for daily brushing while helping to fight plaque and maintain healthy gums and teeth
Designed for effective whitening and freshening this toothpaste features a bold mint flavour that leaves your mouth feeling clean refreshed and free from odour throughout the day
Ideal for coffee tea and wine drinkers the charcoal infused paste targets common staining agents while also supporting deep cleaning for long term oral care and overall dental confidence
description: Product description Colgate Advanced Charcoal Whitening Toothpaste – 3 x 75ml Tubes delivers powerful stain removal and deep cleaning with the natural purifying power of activated charcoal. This advanced fluoride toothpaste is designed to safely and effectively whiten teeth by lifting away surface stains caused by tea, coffee, red wine, and everyday food and drink. The activated charcoal formula works to detoxify the mouth while gently polishing enamel, giving your smile a visibly whiter and fresher look. With each use, this toothpaste helps fight plaque, reduce bacteria, and freshen breath with a cooling mint flavour. The low-abrasion, fluoride-rich formula supports cavity protection and strengthens enamel for long-term oral health. This pack of 3 x 75ml tubes is perfect for daily use, offering long-lasting freshness and results that improve over time. Whether you're looking to maintain white teeth or restore natural brightness, this toothpaste offers a safe and effective solution for healthy gums, enamel strength, and clean breath in one convenient bundle. Includes an EPISHED guide Directions Apply a pea-sized amount to toothbrush, brush for 2 minutes, rinse thoroughly. Safety Warning For external use only. Do not swallow. Keep out of reach of children. Discontinue use and consult a dentist if irritation occurs. See more
